title: UK Institute Is Hunting for Dangers Lurking in AI
summary_full: The government’s A.I. Security Institute, staffed by alumni from OpenAI and Google, is becoming a model for countries grappling with A.I.’s emerging risks.
summary_public: The government’s A.I. Security Institute, staffed by alumni from OpenAI and Google, is becoming a model for countries grappling with A.I.’s emerging risks.

GB.label: positive
GB.evidence: UK Institute Is Hunting for Dangers Lurking in AI
